flags.description: Master toggle. Off = approve middleware always passes through, no instances created. Emergency-only — turning off during an outage bypasses the governance layer for every action decorated with #[AsApprovableAction].
Off = ApprovalGranted event listener no-ops. Approved instances DON'T re-dispatch the underlying action — they wait wedged for manual remediation. Emergency-only when the executor path is a suspect.
Off = DispatchApprovalRemindersJob no-ops. Approvers miss reminder cadence. Emergency-only during notification-vendor outages.
Off = ExpressionLanguageAdapter recompiles every expression per evaluation (no AST cache). Performance-degraded but correctness-preserved. Emergency-only when the cache is a suspect.

Off = ApproverSelectorEngine::resolve() does NOT consult access/delegation for OOF substitutions. Approvers who ARE delegating still receive notifications (missing the OOF handoff). Emergency-only when the delegation-index is corrupted.
Off = the PCI-DSS regex scanner on context_json doesn't run. Actions COULD (via bug or malicious decorator) leak card data into approval contexts. Emergency-only when the scanner is a suspect.

Off = ApprovalSecurityViolation events still fire + write to the audit log, but no Slack + email alert dispatched. Emergency-only during known-incident cleanups where the alerts are duplicating existing on-call tickets.
Off = the platform-plane audit-report endpoint returns 503 service_unavailable. Emergency-only during compliance-report pipeline maintenance.
Off = template edits directly UPDATE the row (no version bump). Version history stops growing. Emergency-only during version-history storage-exhaustion incidents.
Off = ExpireOverdueApprovalsJob no-ops. Overdue instances DON'T transition. Emergency-only during known-issue windows to prevent mass auto-approval/rejection cascades.
